visualization.description: Bar chart showing count of scholarships by payment status
visualization.title: Scholarships: Paid vs Not Paid

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END AS payment_status,
  COUNT(id) AS scholarship_count
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END
ORDER BY CASE WHEN MIN(paid_date) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, scholarship_count DESC;

issues: metadata.rowCount = 1: only the 'Paid' row appears in the result sample (scholarship_count=10); the 'Not Paid' category is omitted—groups with zero counts are not returned by the query. If you want to display a zero bar for 'Not Paid', explicitly include it (e.g., UNION or generate categories).
ORDER BY uses MIN(paid_date) in the GROUP BY context which is unusual but valid here; the visualization x-axis sort (['Paid','Not Paid']) matches the intended ordering.

history: Attempt 1: SQL execution failed: column "payment_status" does not exist
LINE 7: ORDER BY CASE WHEN payment_status = 'Paid' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END...

result.sql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END AS payment_status,
  COUNT(id) AS scholarship_count
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Paid' END
ORDER BY CASE WHEN MIN(paid_date) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, scholarship_count DESC;

ORDER BY uses MIN(paid_date) in the GROUP BY context which is unusual but valid here; the visualization x-axis sort (['Paid','Not Paid']) matches the intended ordering.
